Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The IsCompressedTextureFormat method returns true if the supplied data format stores image data in compressed texture cells.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: constexpr static bool IsCompressedTextureFormat(SourceDataFormat dataFormat); constexpr static bool IsCompressedTextureFormat(DataFormat dataFormat);

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the specified data format is block-compressed, false otherwise.
